title: prunus spinosa subsp. fruticans
intro: Prunus spinosa subsp. fruticans, also known as dwarf blackthorn or wild blackthorn, is a shrub or small tree species that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Prunus spinosa subsp. fruticans include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
